brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: Show me ten lines. I want us both staring at the same thing before I ask anything else.

expected.sql: SELECT timestamp, message, tags FROM logs LIMIT 10

hints.text: Carol: 'I asked for ten lines. That's more than ten.'
Carol: 'Not enough. Ten lines. The LIMIT is right there.'
Carol: 'Something's wrong with the query. The table is called logs, three columns: timestamp, message, tags.'
Carol: 'Three columns — timestamp, message, tags. Table is logs. Limit to ten.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: Right. Time, message, tags. Tags is where we live this season. Get used to it.
